meaning: n.[医]垂体机能减退,垂体机能减退症
examples: There were no complications of severe hypopituitarism and death.
Objective To study the diagnosis of hypopituitarism manifested as hyponatremia in old patients.
Many patients with acromegaly develop hypopituitarism as a result of the pituitary adenoma itself or therapies such as surgery and radiotherapy.
